title: LAWKUL Baby Blankets for Newborn 100% Cotton Knitted Elephant Soft Blanket Airy for Boy Girl Grey, Pram/Mose Basket(90x70cm)
features: 100% COTTON: all of our blankets are crafted with premium cotton to keep the blanket soft, natural, breathable, cozy and kind to sensitive skin.

Multipurpose Use: this blanket has the perfect stretch for swaddling a newborn or great warmth to keep them cozy in the car seat, nursery, pram, crib, stroller, mose basket.And you would find it to be the perfect size to throw over a small chair or a lap blanket when you are reading.

Breathable Design: cellular cotton make more air circulate and a airy blanket is a great way to keep baby cosy and snug. Just the right size and thickness when taking the baby out for travel.Cool in summer and warm in winter.
SIZE: 90x70cm, available in pink, grey, light blue, sage green and beige, ideal for baby care, easy to wrap and hold baby fully.
Durable Fabric: LAWKUL babies blanket has nice tight stitches, pretty weave, it won't come loose even if you wash it multiple times. So it's very easy to care for.
description: LAWKUL baby blanket will take your little one from newborn through into toddlerhood, keep your baby, or toddler, cosy all year round with this cotton cellular blanket, perfect for snuggling up with this cute animal pattern blanket. Fabric: 100% Cotton, Dimensions: 70x90cm, machine washable at 40 degrees.
